name: Kogan.Com Ltd
analysis: KGN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.2300. Trade idea: entry A$4.3200, stop A$3.8412, target A$5.7564 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
